basics.name: Yu Zhu
basics.label: M.Sc. student, Department of Chemistry, Fudan University
basics.summary: M.Sc. student in Chemistry at Fudan University working on AI for Science, machine learning force fields, STM image restoration, and open-set recognition.

work.summary: Contributed to MatterSim and universal machine learning force field benchmarking in Shanghai, China.
highlights: Developed generalized benchmarks to inform model architecture design and training data generation.
Ran inference on models up to 1B parameters and managed high-throughput datasets with up to 200M entries.
Built parallel computational pipelines on Azure Cloud for up to 10K concurrent tasks.

courses: Supervisor: Prof. Xin Xu and Young Researcher Sai Duan
Research interests: machine learning force fields, open-set recognition, scanning tunneling microscopy

education.area: B.Sc., College of Chemistry, Chemical Engineering and Materials Science
courses: Supervisor: Prof. Jianlin Yao and Assoc. Prof. Minmin Xu
Research interests: surface-enhanced Raman spectroscopy and fingerprint imaging

publications.name: Reconstructing Pristine Molecular Orbitals from Scanning Tunneling Microscope Images via Artificial Intelligence Approaches
publications.summary: Yu Zhu, R. Xue, H. Ren, Y. Chen, W. Yan, B. Wu, S. Duan, H. Zhang, L. Chi, and X. Xu. JACS Au 5(7), 3163-3170.

publications.name: Probing the Limit of Heat Transfer in Inorganic Crystals with Deep Learning
publications.summary: Co-authored work on deep learning for heat transfer in inorganic crystals.

publications.name: MatterSim: A Deep Learning Atomistic Model Across Elements, Temperatures and Pressures
publications.summary: Co-authored work on a generalizable deep learning atomistic model.

publications.name: MPBR: Multimodal Progressive Bidirectional Reasoning for Open-Set Fine-Grained Recognition
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV)
publications.summary: Junfu Tan, Peiguang Jing, Yu Zhu, and Yu Liu. ICCV 2025, pp. 1282-1291.

publications.name: KappaFormer: Physics-aware Transformer for lattice thermal conductivity via cross-domain transfer learning
publications.summary: Mengfan Wu, Junfu Tan, Yu Zhu, and Jie Ren. arXiv:2604.03547.

portfolio.name: Reconstruct Molecular Orbitals from STM Images via Artificial Intelligence Approaches
portfolio.description: Physics-driven STM image restoration with STM-Net.

portfolio.name: MatterSim: A Deep Learning Atomistic Model
portfolio.description: Universal machine learning force field benchmarking and high-throughput materials workflows.

portfolio.name: MPBR: Multimodal Progressive Bidirectional Reasoning for OSFGR
portfolio.description: Open-set fine-grained recognition with progressive multimodal reasoning.

portfolio.name: SERS Imaging on Flexible Substrates for Fingerprint Identification Research
portfolio.description: SERS-based chemical imaging for latent and live fingerprint identification.
